content.text: Package A note: apps/admin/src/auth/session.ts has function validateSession; bug A was fixed and closed.
Package B note: packages/auth/src/session.ts also has validateSession; it has an old TODO but no current production bug.

Current production bug: apps/web/src/auth/session.ts validateSession accepts expired refresh tokens when clock skew is negative. Exact failing assertion: refresh token exp must be greater than serverNowMinusSkew.
Rejected fix: changing packages/auth/src/session.ts validateSession does not affect web login and was explicitly rejected.
Final fix target: apps/web/src/auth/session.ts only; add negative-skew expiry guard in validateSession and regression test apps/web/src/auth/session.test.ts expired-refresh-negative-skew.
